description: A feature spec template for a producer/consumer change on an event bus, queue, or stream: event contract, delivery semantics, ordering, idempotency, retries, dead-letter behavior, schema evolution, tracing, and rollout.

variables.name: eventName
variables.description: Name of the primary event the change produces or consumes (e.g. "order-created").

variables.name: deliverySemantics
variables.description: Delivery guarantee the design commits to. Exactly-once is deliberately not an option; pair at-least-once with idempotent consumers.

examples: specbridge template apply event-driven-service --name order-events --var eventName=order-created
